name: Favorite Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix margarine and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Add flour, walnuts, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla; stir until smooth.
4. Beat in egg.
5. Pour into greased baking dish and sprinkle with M&Ms.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until set.
7. Turn off oven and allow to cool on wire rack.
